<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#ffffff"/>

  <!-- ground -->
  <rect x="40" y="430" width="432" height="18" rx="9" fill="#cfcfcf"/>

  <!-- tractor body -->
  <g>
    <path d="M150 310 L270 270 Q292 262 314 270 L360 290 Q372 295 372 308 L372 360 Q372 385 347 385 L175 385 Q150 385 150 360 Z" fill="#2f6fb2"/>

    <!-- hood/engine block -->
    <path d="M150 310 L270 270 L270 385 L175 385 Q150 385 150 360 Z" fill="#2b5f96"/>

    <!-- cabin -->
    <path d="M290 210 L352 220 Q366 223 368 237 L368 305 L270 270 L270 235 Q270 218 290 210 Z" fill="#6fb3d2" stroke="#2b5f96" stroke-width="3"/>
    <path d="M300 230 L342 238 Q350 240 351 248 L351 285 L270 250 L270 240 Q270 229 300 230 Z" fill="#9ed6f0"/>

    <!-- steering bar -->
    <path d="M330 255 L360 240" stroke="#1f3f66" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/>

    <!-- exhaust -->
    <path d="M355 280 L382 290 L378 310 L352 304 Z" fill="#d7d7d7" stroke="#8a8a8a" stroke-width="2"/>
    <path d="M374 263 L388 274" stroke="#8a8a8a" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- front grill / details -->
  <g>
    <path d="M248 350 C220 340 215 320 228 305 L250 290 L285 320 L270 355 Z" fill="#255a86" opacity="0.95"/>
    <path d="M235 318 L286 360" stroke="#6fb3d2" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M220 332 L286 371" stroke="#6fb3d2" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.9"/>
  </g>

  <!-- wheels -->
  <g>
    <!-- rear wheel -->
    <circle cx="145" cy="405" r="72" fill="#1b1b1b"/>
    <circle cx="145" cy="405" r="56" fill="#2b2b2b"/>
    <circle cx="145" cy="405" r="18" fill="#4a4a4a"/>
    <g stroke="#6fb3d2" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round">
      <path d="M145 349 L145 405"/>
      <path d="M116 396 L145 405"/>
      <path d="M173 396 L145 405"/>
      <path d="M145 405 L145 461"/>
      <path d="M116 414 L145 405"/>
      <path d="M173 414 L145 405"/>
    </g>

    <!-- front wheel -->
    <circle cx="355" cy="405" r="64" fill="#1b1b1b"/>
    <circle cx="355" cy="405" r="50" fill="#2b2b2b"/>
    <circle cx="355" cy="405" r="16" fill="#4a4a4a"/>
    <g stroke="#6fb3d2" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round">
      <path d="M355 360 L355 405"/>
      <path d="M330 395 L355 405"/>
      <path d="M380 395 L355 405"/>
      <path d="M355 405 L355 450"/>
      <path d="M330 415 L355 405"/>
      <path d="M380 415 L355 405"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- axle / hitch -->
  <g>
    <path d="M230 385 L260 385" stroke="#1f3f66" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M165 385 L210 385" stroke="#1f3f66" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M355 385 C330 375 310 370 285 372" stroke="#255a86" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="285" cy="372" r="10" fill="#1f3f66"/>
    <circle cx="305" cy="372" r="7" fill="#6fb3d2" opacity="0.9"/>
  </g>

  <!-- headlight -->
  <g>
    <circle cx="232" cy="366" r="10" fill="#ffd36a" stroke="#caa13a" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="232" cy="366" r="4" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.9"/>
  </g>

</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
